overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a character in a tan duster coat exploring a muddy Old West town. The character walks through the main street passing wooden storefronts, turns around near a livery stable, and heads back through town past the Saints Hotel before following a horse rider into the open countryside.

scene_state.functional_zone: main street of western town with general store and livery

events.description: horse-drawn carriage with two occupants passes by on the left side of the road

agents.ego_description: walking steadily down the muddy main street, passing wooden storefronts and approaching a livery stable

notable_agents.action: horse-drawn carriage moving from left to right past the character

entered.detail: two-story wooden building with 'WORTH'S GENERAL STORE' signage and porch
large white wooden barn with open entrance and weathered facade
snow-capped mountains visible in the distant background
tall wooden telegraph pole with crossbars and wires

segments.scene_description: The character walks down the muddy main street of a Western town, passing Worth's General Store on the right. A horse-drawn carriage passes by on the left. The character continues toward a large wooden livery stable at the end of the street, with snow-capped mountains visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: western town street with hotel and saloon buildings

events.description: character performs a 180-degree turn to walk back in the opposite direction

agents.ego_description: turned around and walking back through town, approaching the Saints Hotel building

entered.detail: large two-story wooden building with 'SAINTS HOTEL' painted on the side and covered porch

segments.scene_description: After turning around near the livery stable, the character walks back through town. The Saints Hotel comes into view on the left side, a prominent two-story wooden structure. The character passes various wooden storefronts while the utility pole shifts to the right side of the frame.

scene_state.functional_zone: edge of town transitioning to open prairie with grassland

events.description: horse-drawn carriage passes by on the road heading out of town
cowboy on white horse gallops past and continues down the road ahead

agents.ego_description: walking past the hotel toward the edge of town, then following a horse rider into the open countryside

notable_agents.action: carriage with two horses and driver passing by on the road
cowboy on white horse riding past and leading the way into the rural area

entered.detail: empty wooden wagon with metal wheels parked on the roadside
open grassy fields and prairie beyond the town limits
wooden corral or fence structure near the edge of town

segments.scene_description: The character walks past the Saints Hotel toward the edge of town where the buildings give way to open grassland. A horse-drawn carriage passes by, followed by a cowboy on a white horse who gallops past and leads the way down the dirt road into the rural countryside, with wooden fences and open prairie visible ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a muddy Western town that gradually opens into a wide rural prairie. It begins with the character walking down the main street past Worth's General Store as a horse-drawn carriage passes by, moving toward a large wooden livery stable set against a backdrop of snow-capped mountains. After turning around near the stable, the camera tracks back through town, passing the prominent two-story Saints Hotel and various wooden storefronts as the perspective shifts. The scene then expands as the character reaches the edge of town, where the dense buildings give way to open grassland and dirt roads. Finally, the camera follows a cowboy on a white horse who gallops past, leading the way out of the settlement and into the open countryside marked by wooden fences and rolling prairie.
